content: By 2025, 2025-era self-supervised autonomous agents can leverage a Numerical Planning Operator Learner framework to self-discover parametric planning operators from uncurated interaction histories, rather than relying on hand-coded operators or pre-defined task reward structures. This lets curiosity-driven agents learn to plan for open-ended long-horizon tasks by continuously refining their own planning primitives through self-supervised interaction, rather than being constrained to fixed planning rules.
